A0144.title: Software-Level Side-Channel Mitigation
A0144.definition: Reducing side-channel information leakage through software implementation techniques
A0144.description: Software-level protection: constant-time cryptographic libraries; avoiding key-dependent branching; memory access pattern obfuscation; using bit masks instead of conditionals; periodic key rotation; minimizing privileged code scope.
A0144.limitation: Software-based methods have limited effectiveness; may impact performance; difficult to completely eliminate leakage.
